generated_oml:
@prefix DTDFVocab: https://example.com/DTDFVocab# .
@prefix base: http://example.org/base# .

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python-based interface that collects data from the physical lab-scale gantry crane system for transmission to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "State data of the lab-scale gantry crane including position, velocity, and other operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication, VisualizationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based application that streams crane state data to TimescaleDB for historical storage and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for implementing optimal control algorithms on the crane"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation of physical and digital twin systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Containerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technology for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model used for digital twin architecture visualization with context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Containerization
]

instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for research and educational purposes with public availability and low cost"
]

instance ResearchEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory setting for digital twin research and education"
    base:contains LabScaleGantryCrane
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for storing and analyzing historical crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control service for efficient crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from stored historical crane data for analysis"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insight for crane operational status"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to optimize crane movement for efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight ensuring accuracy between physical and digital twin systems"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application are sent through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture is defined using the C4 Model, specifically context and container diagrams, to illustrate system boundaries, components, and their relationships within the cyber-physical gantry crane system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter-service communication is handled by an MQTT Broker, connecting services such as Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, Dashboard, and Logging Application. Network topology details, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]
